name: Triple Chocolate Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Devils Food Cake Mix (18 Oz.)
1 Package Instant Chocolate Pudding Mix (4 Oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour bundt pan; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine cake mix, pudding mix, and chocolate chips.
4. In a separate bowl, combine water, eggs, and vanilla; mix well.
5. Add egg mixture to dry mixture and mix by hand just until blended.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until cake tests done (insert toothpick into center; if it comes out clean, it's done).
8. Cool 15 minutes before removing cake from pan.
9. When completely cool, drizzle cake with Chocolate Glaze:
a. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and beat by hand until smooth.
b. Serve this easy, but rich cake with a scoop of real vanilla ice cream.
